# DEV-408 Use Get Logs URL in jobs

**Resonance1584** commented *Jul 24, 2024*

Sibling PR of https://github.com/gruntwork-io/pipelines-actions/pull/55

See an example run here: https://github.com/gruntwork-io-demo/demo3-infrastructure-live-root/actions/runs/10078849010/job/27867542804#step:12:32

Attempts to determine a url linking directly to the logs for a job, falls back to previous url if this fails.
